title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Titan Company in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!
